name: Catts, Sidney Johnston, Jr.
description: On a pathway constant with travail, Our footprints of struggling years Are left in the dust behind us, Which time erases and clears. Now crowned, gowned and honored, Sweet fruit of an earnest heart, We arise to go—yet hesitating Pause once to look back—and depart.

name: Royal, P. Terry
motto: "He seen his duty and he done it."

name: Thompson, William Earl
description: The last recitation is over, The last class heard and tried, Our way lies east and westward On furrowless fields, world-wide. But one thing left deep in our memory As it ever was held, shall it be, Hallowed, revered and honored: Our beloved University. —F. Langworthy. 1922 PAGE 63
